combined_text: LAKEVIEW, TX (ORANGE COUNTY) "LAKEVIEW, TX (ORANGE COUNTY)Robert Wooster LAKEVIEW, TEXAS (Orange County). Lakeview is on the east bank of the Neches River just west of Farm Road 1131, ten miles north of Beaumont in extreme northwestern Orange County.
